title: Summarize Social Media Post with Key Takeaways
scenario: Write a prompt to summarize a social media post. The target output should include the post's title, author's name, main points, and key takeaways. The output should be in an informal tone and include relevant hashtags. Limit the prompt to 100 words.
constraints: Must include the post's title and author's name
Must have at least 2 main points and key takeaways
Must be written in an informal tone

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify if the post's title and author's name are included
Assess if the main points are accurate and concise
Evaluate if the key takeaways are relevant and helpful
